119572.description_ja_long: 八ヶ岳・横岳の西面にそびえる岩峰で、大同心と並び岩壁の威容を見せる。同心とは江戸幕府の警務役人のことで、信仰の山だった奥ノ院を警護する姿に見立てたと伝わる。
119572.description_ja_short: 横岳西面に立つ岩峰。名は奥ノ院を守る同心の見立て。
119572.description_en_long: Shodoshin is a rock pinnacle rising on the west face of Yokodake in the Yatsugatake range, showing an imposing wall alongside Odoshin. A doshin was a police officer of the Edo shogunate, and the towers are said to be likened to guards protecting the once-sacred Okunoin.
119572.description_en_short: A rock pinnacle on Yokodake's west face, likened to a doshin officer guarding the Okunoin.
